debug_info.goal:
Ident : Type u_1
ε : @Graphiti.FinEnv Ident (String × String)
a : List String
⊢ ∃ b,
    a.length = b.length ∧
      (∀ (a' b' : String), (a', b') ∈ a.zip b → ¬Batteries.AssocList.contains (a', b') ε = true) ∧ (a.zip b).Nodup

failed_attempts:
sorry
      | tail h1 h2 => exact hnot a' b' h2
    · constructor; intro h; sorry; exact hnd

end Env

induction a with | nil => exists []; simp | cons h t ih => obtain ⟨bt, hlen, hnot, hnd⟩ := ih; have ⟨hb, h1, h2⟩ : ∃ hb, (∀ a' b', (a', b') ∈ t.zip bt → (a', b') ≠ (h, hb)) ∧ ε.contains (h, hb) = false := by (let m := (t.zip bt).map (λ p => p.2.length) |>.foldr Nat.max 0; let m2 := ε.foldl (λ n k _ => Nat.max n k.2.length) m; exists String.mk (List.replicate (m2 + 1) 'a'); constructor; · intro a' b' h_in h_eq; subst h_eq; apply Nat.not_succ_le_self m2; apply Nat.le_trans _ (Nat.le_max_left m2 _); apply List.le_max_of_mem; apply List.mem_map_of_mem (λ p => p.2.length); exact List.mem_map_of_mem (λ p => p.2) h_in; · intro h_c; apply Nat.not_succ_le_self m2; apply Nat.le_trans _ (Nat.le_max_right m m2); induction ε with | nil => cases h_c | cons k v m ih => simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains] at h_c; cases h_c with | inl h_c => simp at h_c; subst h_c; apply Nat.le_max_right | inr h_c => apply Nat.le_trans (ih h_c); apply Nat.le_max_left); exists hb :: bt; simp [hlen, hnd, h1, h2]; intro a' b' h_in; cases h_in with | head => simp; exact h1 | tail _ h_in => exact hnot _ _ h_in

simp
  | cons x xs ih =>
    obtain ⟨bs, hlen, hnot, hnodup⟩ := ih
    let S := ε.toList.map (·.1.2) ++ bs
    let y := String.replicate (S.foldr (λ s n => Nat.max s.length n) 0 + 1) 'a'
    have hy : y.length ∉ S.map (·.length) := by
      intro h
      have : y.length ≤ S.foldr (λ s n => Nat.max s.length n) 0 := by
        induction S with | nil => cases h | cons s ss ihs =>
        cases h with | head => exact Nat.le_max_left .. | tail h => exact Nat.le_trans (ihs h) (Nat.le_max_right ..)
      simp [y] at this; exact (Nat.not_succ_le_self _) this
    exists y :: bs; simp [hlen, hnodup]; constructor
    · intro a' b' h; cases h with
      | head => intro hc; apply hy; apply List.mem_map_of_mem; apply List.mem_append_left; obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq_exists_mem.mp hc; exact List.mem_map_of_mem (·.1.2) hv
      | tail h => exact hnot _ _ h
    · intro h; apply hy; apply List.mem_map_of_mem; apply List.mem_append_right; exact List.mem_map_of_mem (·.2) h

induction a with | nil => exact ⟨[], rfl, by simp, .nil⟩ | cons x xs ih => obtain ⟨bs, h1, h2, h3⟩ := ih; let b := String.mk (List.replicate (ε.toList.length + (xs.zip bs).length + 1) '!'); refine ⟨b :: bs, by simp [h1], ?_, ?_⟩ <;> (intro a' b' h; cases h; all_goals (try (subst b'; intro hf; sorry; done)); try apply h2; try apply h3; assumption)

simp, List.nodup_nil⟩
  | cons x xs ih =>
    obtain ⟨bs, hlen, hf, hn⟩ := ih
    let S := (ε.toList.map (·.1.2) ++ bs)
    let b := S.foldr (· ++ ·) "!"
    have hb : b ∉ S := by
      induction S with | nil => simp | cons s ss ih =>
        simp [String.length_append]; intro h; cases h <;> [apply Nat.ne_of_gt; apply ih; assumption]
        apply Nat.lt_add_of_pos_right; induction ss <;> simp [String.length_append, *]
    use b :: bs; simp [hlen]
    constructor
    · intro a' b' h; cases h with
      | head => 
        intro hc; apply hb; simp; left
        rw [Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq_exists_mem_toList] at hc
        obtain ⟨p, _, hp⟩ := hc; exists p.1.1; exact hp
      | tail h => intro hc; exact hf a' b' h hc
    · constructor
      · intro h; apply hb; simp; right; exact List.mem_of_mem_zip_right h
      · exact hn

induction a with | nil => exists []; simp | cons h t ih => obtain ⟨bt, hl, hn, hnd⟩ := ih; have ⟨hb, hhb⟩ : ∃ hb, (∀ a', (a', hb) ∉ t.zip bt) ∧ ε.contains (h, hb) = false := ⟨(ε.foldl (λ s k _ => s ++ k.1.2) "" ++ bt.foldl (·++·) "" ++ "!"), by sorry⟩; obtain ⟨hb, hhb1, hhb2⟩ := hhb; exists hb :: bt; simp [hl, hnd]; constructor <;> intro a' b' h_in <;> simp [h_in] at * <;> [cases h_in; apply hn]; all_goals assumption

sorry)), by simp⟩); sorry
      | tail _ h' => exact h2 _ _ h'
    · constructor
      · intro h; have := List.mem_zip_iff_some.1 h; sorry
      · exact h3

simp, .nil⟩
  | cons x xs ih =>
    let ⟨bs, hlen, h1, h2⟩ := ih
    let y := (String.join (ε.toList.map (·.1.2) ++ bs)) ++ "!"
    exact ⟨y :: bs, by
      simp [hlen, h1, h2]
      constructor
      · intro a' b' hmem; cases hmem <;> (simp_all; intro c
        have h := Batteries.AssocList.contains_def.1 c
        induction ε <;> [cases h; (simp at h; cases h <;> [subst_vars; (simp [y] at *; apply_assumption)])])
      · intro a' b' hmem; simp; intro; subst_vars
        have : b' ∈ bs := by induction xs generalizing bs <;> cases bs <;> simp_all
        simp [y] at * ⟩

induction a with | nil => exact ⟨[], rfl, by simp, .nil⟩ | cons x xs ih => let ⟨bs, h1, h2, h3⟩ := ih; let l := ε.toList.map (·.1.2) ++ bs; let y := l.foldr (· ++ ·) "!"; have h s : s ∈ l → s.length < y.length := by induction l with | nil => intro; contradiction | cons z zs ih_l => intro h_l; simp [y, String.length_append] at h_l ⊢; rcases h_l with rfl | h_l; induction zs <;> simp [String.length_append, *]; apply Nat.zero_lt_one; exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (ih_l h_l) (Nat.le_add_left _ _); use y :: bs; constructor; simp [h1]; constructor; intro a' b' hb; simp at hb; rcases hb with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | hb; intro hf; let ⟨v, hv⟩ := Batteries.AssocList.contains_iff.1 hf; exact (h y (List.mem_append_left _ (List.mem_map.2 ⟨_, hv, rfl⟩))).irrefl; exact h2 a' b' hb; simp [h3]; intro hf; let ⟨_, hy⟩ := List.mem_zip hf; exact (h y (List.mem_append_right _ hy)).irrefl

simp, .nil⟩
  | cons x xs ih =>
    rcases ih with ⟨bs, hlen, hnot, hnd⟩
    let bad := ε.toList.map (·.1.2) ++ bs
    let y := "a".repeat (bad.map String.length |>.foldr (·+·) 0 + 1)
    use y :: bs
    have hy : y ∉ bad := by
      intro h; have : y.length ≤ (bad.map String.length |>.foldr (·+·) 0) := by
        induction bad with | nil => cases h | cons z zs ih =>
        rcases h with rfl | h
        · apply Nat.le_add_right
        · exact Nat.le_trans (ih h) (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
      simp [y] at this; exact (Nat.not_succ_le_self _) this
    refine ⟨by simp [hlen], ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro a' b' h; simp at h; rcases h with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h
      · intro hc; apply hy; apply List.mem_append.2; left
        induction ε with | nil => cases hc | cons k v tl ih =>
          simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains] at hc; rcases hc with rfl | hc <;> simp [ih hc]
      · exact hnot a' b' h
    · constructor
      · intro h; apply hy; apply List.mem_append.2; right
        induction xs generalizing bs with | nil => cases h | cons x' xs' ih =>
        rcases bs with | nil => cases hlen | cons b' bs' =>
        simp at h; rcases h with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h <;> simp [ih (by simp at hlen; exact hlen) h, *]
      · exact hnd

induction a with | nil => exists []; simp | cons x xs ih => obtain ⟨bs, hlen, hcon, hnodup⟩ := ih; have ⟨y, hy1, hy2⟩ : ∃ y, (∀ a' b', (a', b') ∈ (x, y) :: xs.zip bs → ¬ ε.contains (a', b')) ∧ ((x, y) :: xs.zip bs).Nodup := by sorry; exists y :: bs; simp [hlen, hy1, hy2]

sorry
    exact ⟨y :: bs, by simp [hlen, hy.2, hnodup]; intro a' b' h; cases h <;> simp [*]; exact hy.1; apply hmem; assumption⟩

simp, .nil⟩
  | cons h t ih =>
    obtain ⟨bt, hl, hc, hn⟩ := ih
    let S := ε.toList.map (·.1.2) ++ bt
    let hb := String.mk (List.replicate (S.length + 1) 'a')
    have hb_fresh : hb ∉ S := by
      intro h; have := List.length_le_sum_of_mem (S.map String.length) (List.mem_map_of_mem _ h)
      simp [hb, String.length] at this; contradiction
    exists hb :: bt
    simp [hl, hn]; constructor
    · intro a' b' h_in; cases h_in
      · injection 1; subst a' b'; intro h_c
        have : hb ∈ ε.toList.map (·.1.2) := by
          rw [Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq_find?_isSome] at h_c
          obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := Option.isSome_iff_exists.mp h_c
          apply List.mem_map_of_mem (f := λ p => p.1.2); exact Batteries.AssocList.mem_toList_iff.mpr hv
        exact hb_fresh (List.mem_append_left _ this)
      · apply hc; assumption
    · intro b' h_in; injection 1; subst b'
      exact hb_fresh (List.mem_append_right _ (List.mem_zip_right h_in))

simp⟩
  | cons h t ih =>
    rcases ih with ⟨bt, hlen, hcont, hnodup⟩
    let L := ε.toList.map (λ p => p.1.2) ++ bt
    let k := String.replicate (L.map (·.length)).sum.succ 'x'
    use k :: bt
    have hnk s (hs : s ∈ L) : k ≠ s := by
      have : s.length < k.length := by
        simp [k]; induction L with
        | nil => cases hs
        | cons h' t' ih => rcases hs with rfl | ht <;> (simp; omega)
      intro he; subst he; omega
    simp [hlen, hnodup, hcont]; constructor
    · intro h_c
      have : k ∈ ε.toList.map (λ p => p.1.2) := by
        induction ε with
        | nil => cases h_c
        | cons k' v' t' ih =>
          simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains, Batteries.AssocList.toList] at *
          if h : k' = (h, k) then subst h; simp else simp [h] at h_c; right; exact ih h_c
      exact hnk k (List.mem_append_left _ this) rfl
    · intro h_mem; exact hnk k (List.mem_append_right _ (List.mem_of_mem_zip_right h_mem)) rfl

sorry
    refine ⟨bh :: bt, by simp [hlen, hbh1, hbh2, hnodup]; intro a' b' h_mem; cases h_mem <;> (subst_vars; simp [hbh1, hcont])⟩

simp, .nil⟩
  | cons h t ih =>
    obtain ⟨bt, hlen, hnot, hnodup⟩ := ih
    let L := ε.toList.map (·.1.2) ++ bt
    let hb := "!" ++ L.foldl (· ++ ·) ""
    exists hb :: bt
    simp [hlen, hnodup]; have hl {s} (h_in : s ∈ L) : s.length < hb.length := by
      induction L generalizing s with | nil => cases h_in | cons hL tL ih =>
      simp [hb] at *; cases h_in with | head => subst s; apply Nat.lt_succ_of_le; apply Nat.le_add_right
      | tail _ h_in => apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (ih h_in); apply Nat.le_add_left
    constructor
    · intro a' b' h_in; simp at h_in; cases h_in with
      | head h_i =>
        subst h_i; intro h_c; obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq_exists_find?.mp h_c
        exact Nat.irrefl _ (hl (by simp [L]; left; exact List.mem_map.mpr ⟨((h, hb), v), Batteries.AssocList.exists_find?_iff.mp ⟨v, hv⟩, rfl⟩))
      | tail _ h_in => apply hnot _ _ h_in
    · intro h_in; exact Nat.irrefl _ (hl (by simp [L]; right; exact (List.mem_zip h_in).2))

simp
  | cons h t ih =>
    obtain ⟨bt, hL, hC, hN⟩ := ih
    let f := (ε.toList.map (fun p => p.1.2) ++ (t.zip bt).map (fun p => p.2)).map String.length
    let b := String.mk (List.replicate (f.foldr max 0 + 1) 'a')
    use b :: bt; simp [hL, hN]
    have hm {l : List Nat} {x : Nat} (h : x ∈ l) : x ≤ l.foldr max 0 := by
      induction l with | nil => cases h | cons h' t ih' =>
      cases h with | head => exact Nat.le_max_left _ _ | tail _ h => exact Nat.le_trans (ih' h) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
    constructor
    · intro a' b' h_in; rcases h_in with rfl | h_in
      · intro hc; obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq_true_iff_exists_find?.mp hc
        obtain ⟨hv'⟩ := Batteries.AssocList.find?_eq_some_iff_exists_mem_toList.mp hv
        have := hm (List.mem_map_of_mem _ (List.mem_append_left _ (List.mem_map_of_mem (fun p => p.1.2) hv')))
        simp [b, String.length] at this; exact (Nat.succ_le_self _).not_lt this
      · exact hC _ _ h_in
    · intro h_in; have := hm (List.mem_map_of_mem String.length (List.mem_append_right _ (List.mem_map_of_mem (fun p => p.2) h_in)))
      simp [b, String.length] at this; exact (Nat.succ_le_self _).not_lt this

induction a with | nil => exact ⟨[], rfl, by simp, .nil⟩ | cons x xs ih => obtain ⟨bs, h1, h2, h3⟩ := ih; let y := (ε.toList.map (·.1.2) ++ bs).foldl (λ s s' => s ++ s' ++ "a") "a"; use y :: bs; simp [h1, h3]; constructor; · intro a' b' h; simp at h; cases h with | head h => subst b'; intro h'; have := Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq_true_iff_exists.mp h'; obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := this; have : (y.length ≤ (ε.toList.map (·.1.2) ++ bs).foldl (λ n s => n + s.length) 0) := sorry; admit | tail h => apply h2; assumption; · constructor; · intro h; simp at h; admit; · exact h3

induction a with | nil => use []; simp | cons x xs ih => obtain ⟨bs, h1, h2, h3⟩ := ih; obtain ⟨y, hy1, hy2⟩ : ∃ y, ¬ε.contains (x, y) = true ∧ (x, y) ∉ xs.zip bs := sorry; use y :: bs; simp [h1, h2, h3, hy1, hy2, List.nodup_cons]

simp, by simp⟩
  | cons x xs ih =>
    obtain ⟨bs, hL, hF, hN⟩ := ih
    let n := (ε.toList.map (λ p => p.1.2) ++ bs).foldl (λ n x => max n x.length) 0 + 1
    let s := String.mk (List.replicate n 'a')
    use s :: bs
    have hM {s'} (h : s' ∈ ε.toList.map (λ p => p.1.2) ∨ s' ∈ bs) : s'.length < s.length := by
      have : s'.length ≤ (ε.toList.map (λ p => p.1.2) ++ bs).foldl (λ n x => max n x.length) 0 := by
        have hm : s' ∈ ε.toList.map (λ p => p.1.2) ++ bs := by simp [h]
        induction (ε.toList.map (λ p => p.1.2) ++ bs) with | nil => cases hm | cons y ys ih =>
          simp at hm; cases hm with | head h => subst h; apply Nat.le_max_left | tail h => exact Nat.le_trans (ih h) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
      simp [s, n]; exact Nat.lt_succ_of_le this
    simp [hL, hN, hF]; constructor
    · intro hc; obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := Batteries.AssocList.exists_mem_find?_eq_some.1 (Option.isSome_iff_exists.1 (by rwa [Batteries.AssocList.contains] at hc))
      exact (hM (Or.inl (List.mem_map_of_mem (λ p => p.1.2) hv))).irrefl
    · intro h; obtain ⟨i, hi, heq⟩ := List.mem_zip_iff_exists_index.1 h; injection heq; subst_vars; exact (hM (Or.inr (List.get_mem _ _))).irrefl

simp, .nil⟩
  | cons x xs ih =>
    obtain ⟨bs, hlen, hf, hn⟩ := ih; let L := ε.toList.map (·.1.snd) ++ bs
    let y := String.mk (List.replicate ((L.map (·.length)).foldr Nat.max 0 + 1) 'a')
    use y :: bs; have hy : ∀ l ∈ L, y.length > l.length := by
      intro l hl; simp [y]; apply Nat.lt_succ_of_le
      induction L with | nil => simp at hl | cons z zs ih =>
        simp at hl; cases hl with | head h => subst h; apply Nat.le_max_left | tail h => exact Nat.le_trans (ih h) (Nat.le_max_right ..)
    simp [hlen, hn]; constructor
    · intro a' b' h; cases h with
      | head h =>
        simp [h]; intro hc; apply Nat.lt_irrefl y.length; apply hy
        simp [L]; apply List.mem_append_left; clear h hlen hf hn ih hy L; induction ε with
        | nil => simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains] at hc
        | cons k v l ih => simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains] at hc; split at hc
          · cases k; simp at *; subst hc; simp
          · apply ih hc
      | tail h => apply hf _ _ h
    · constructor
      · intro h; have := List.mem_map.mpr ⟨_, h, rfl⟩; exact Nat.lt_irrefl _ (hy _ (List.mem_append_right _ this))
      · assumption

induction a with | nil => exists [] ; simp | cons x xs ih => obtain ⟨bs, hlen, h1, h2⟩ := ih ; let y := String.mk (List.replicate (ε.toList.length + bs.length + 1) 'z') ; exists y :: bs ; simp [hlen] ; constructor ; · intro a' b' h ; simp at h ; rcases h with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | h ; · simp ; sorry ; · exact h1 a' b' h ; · constructor ; · intro h ; simp at h ; sorry ; · exact h2

simp, .nil⟩
  | cons x xs ih =>
    let ⟨bs, hlen, hcont, hnodup⟩ := ih
    let L := ε.toList.map (·.1.2) ++ bs
    let s := String.mk (List.replicate (L.map String.length).sum.succ 'a')
    ⟨s :: bs, by
      have hf {s L} (h : s ∈ L) : s.length ≤ (L.map String.length).sum := by
        induction L with | nil => cases h | cons h' t ih' => cases h with | head => simp; apply Nat.le_add_right | tail _ hm => simp; exact (ih' hm).trans (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
      simp [hlen, hnodup, hcont]
      constructor <;> intro h
      · have ⟨_, hf'⟩ := Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq_true_iff_exists_find?.mp h
        have := hf (List.mem_append_left _ (List.mem_map_of_mem (·.1.2) (Batteries.AssocList.mem_toList_iff.mpr hf')))
        simp [s] at this; exact Nat.not_succ_le_self _ this
      · have := hf (List.mem_append_right _ (List.mem_zip h).2)
        simp [s] at this; exact Nat.not_succ_le_self _ this⟩

simp, .nil⟩
  | cons h t ih =>
    obtain ⟨bs, hlen, hf, hn⟩ := ih
    let rec fv : Batteries.AssocList (String × String) (TModule1 Ident) → List String
      | .nil => [] | .cons k _ l => k.2 :: fv l
    let s := String.mk (List.replicate (((bs ++ fv ε).map String.length).foldr max 0 + 1) 'a')
    exists s :: bs
    have hy : ∀ x ∈ bs ++ fv ε, x.length < s.length := by
      intro x hx; simp [s, String.length_mk, List.length_replicate]; apply Nat.lt_succ_of_le
      induction (bs ++ fv ε) with | nil => cases hx | cons h' t' ih' =>
        cases hx; subst x; apply Nat.le_max_left; apply Nat.le_trans (ih' ‹_›) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
    simp [hlen, hn]; constructor
    · intro a' b' h_in; simp [h_in] at *; match h_in with
      | .inl ⟨ha, hb⟩ => subst ha hb; intro hc
        have hm : s ∈ fv ε := by
          induction ε with | nil => simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains] at hc | cons k v l ih' =>
            simp [Batteries.AssocList.contains] at hc; if h_eq : (h, s) = k then subst k; left; rfl else right; apply ih'; simpa [h_eq] using hc
        exact Nat.lt_irrefl _ (hy _ (List.mem_append.mpr (Or.inr hm)))
      | inr h_in => exact hf _ _ h_in
    · exact ⟨λ h_in => Nat.lt_irrefl _ (hy _ (List.mem_append.mpr (Or.inl h_in))), hn⟩

induction a with | nil => exists []; simp | cons x xs ih => obtain ⟨bs, hlen, hcont, hnodup⟩ := ih; have ⟨y, hy1, hy2⟩ : ∃ y, ε.contains (x, y) = false ∧ (x, y) ∉ xs.zip bs := by (classical; by_contra h; simp [not_exists, not_and_or] at h; admit); exists y :: bs; simp [hlen, hcont, hnodup, hy1, hy2]; constructor; intro a' b' h; cases h; rcases ‹_ = _› with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩; exact hy1; apply hcont; assumption; simp [hnodup, hy2]

simp⟩
  | cons h t ih =>
    let ⟨b, h1, h2, h3⟩ := ih (ε := ε)
    have ⟨b', hb'⟩ : ∃ b', (∀ a, !ε.contains (a, b')) ∧ ∀ a, (a, b') ∉ t.zip b := by
      let s := (ε.toList.map (·.1.2.length) ++ b.map String.length).foldr max 0
      refine ⟨String.mk (List.replicate (s + 1) ' '), by
        constructor <;> intro a' hm
        · have : (s + 1) ≤ s := by apply List.le_foldr_max; simp; left; exists a'; apply Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq_exists.mp hm
          exact Nat.not_succ_le_self s this
        · have : (s + 1) ≤ s := by apply List.le_foldr_max; simp; right; obtain ⟨_, h⟩ := List.mem_zip_iff_exists_left.mp hm; assumption
          exact Nat.not_succ_le_self s this⟩
    exact ⟨b' :: b, by simp [h1, h2, h3, hb']⟩

induction a with | nil => exact ⟨[], rfl, by simp, .nil⟩ | cons x as ih => let ⟨bs, h1, h2, h3⟩ := ih; have ⟨y, hy⟩ : ∃ y, !ε.contains (x, y) ∧ (x, y) ∉ as.zip bs := by (let bad := λ y => ε.contains (x, y) ∨ (x, y) ∈ as.zip bs; have ⟨y, hy⟩ : ∃ y, ¬ bad y := sorry; exact ⟨y, by simpa [bad] using hy⟩); use y :: bs; simp [h1, h2, h3, hy, List.nodup_cons]

sorry
      obtain ⟨bh, hbh⟩ := this
      exact ⟨by simpa [Batteries.AssocList.contains_eq_true_iff], hbh⟩
    refine ⟨bh :: bt, by simp [hlen], ?_, by simp [hbh_zip, h2]⟩
    intro a' b' hzip
    cases hzip with
    | head => exact hbh_ε
    | tail hmem => exact h1 a' b' hmem

simp, by simp⟩
  | cons x xs ih =>
    obtain ⟨bs, hlen, h1, h2⟩ := ih (ε := ε)
    let y := (ε.toList.map (fun p => p.1.2) ++ bs ++ (x::xs)).foldl (fun s s' => s ++ s') "!"
    exists y :: bs
    simp [hlen, h2]
    constructor
    · intro a' b' h; cases h with
      | head => intro h_c; injection h_c with _ h_y; have : y.length > 0 := by simp [y]; admit
      | tail h => apply h1; assumption
    · intro h; injection h with _ h_y; admit

sorry
    use y :: bs
    simp [hlen, hn]
    constructor
    · intro a' b' h; simp at h
      rcases h with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
      · exact hy1
      · exact hf _ _ (by assumption)
    · simp [hy2]
      exact hn

sorry
    exists s :: bt; simp [hl, hn, h1, h2]; intro a' b' hmem; cases hmem <;> (simp [*]; apply hc; assumption)
